## QA checklist

- [ ] Public homepage loads.
- [ ] Issue Finder can complete all 3 steps.
- [ ] Issue Finder result shows related projects.
- [ ] Contact form still submits.
- [ ] Admin login still works if admin code changed.
- [ ] Case/slide/project admin save still works if content admin changed.
- [ ] Mobile 390px layout has no text overlap.
- [ ] Motion respects `prefers-reduced-motion`.
- [ ] No heavy dependency was added without a clear reason.
- [ ] Privacy-sensitive fields were not expanded unnecessarily.
